frame_analyses.description: Two laparoscopic scissors positioned near gauze with green circular marking. Gauze appears well suspended between clamps.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good instrument positioning, gauze properly tensioned

frame_analyses.description: Right scissors making initial entry cut at top of circle. Cut appears to follow green line closely.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Precise cutting technique, good line following

frame_analyses.description: Continuing clockwise around circle. Both instruments working together to maintain tension and cut.
Cutting through right side of circle. Some minor deviation from line visible in this section.
Progressing through bottom portion of circle. Cut line appears to follow marking reasonably well.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Improved precision compared to previous section

frame_analyses.description: Left side of circle being cut. Good tissue handling with assistant grasper maintaining tension.
Approaching completion of circular cut. Final connection point visible at top of circle.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Nearly complete circular cut with good overall precision

frame_analyses.description: Circle cut appears complete. Center portion of gauze separated from outer portion. Gauze remains attached to clamps.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task successfully completed, gauze integrity maintained

penalties.description: Minor deviation from marked line visible primarily in right quadrant of circle

confidence_rationale: Clear view of cutting action and gauze throughout procedure. Line deviation measurements estimated from video quality but consistently observable. Completion time and gauze integrity clearly assessed.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter measurements at all cardinal points due to video resolution and angle
technique_summary: Expert-level performance with excellent time (63s vs 60-90s expert benchmark) and good precision cutting. Minor deviation penalties in one quadrant only.
strengths: Excellent completion time at expert level
Maintained gauze integrity and clamp attachment
improvement_suggestions: Focus on maintaining consistent line following in all quadrants
Consider slightly slower cutting speed in areas of deviation to improve precision
